allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\) from docx import Document doc = Document\('Seminar programare SAS 4.docx'\) for p in doc.paragraphs: if p.text.strip\(\): print\(p.text\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\) import pdfplumber with pdfplumber.open\('01_Introducere_Python.pdf'\) as pdf: for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\): text = page.extract_text\(\) if text: print\(f'--- Pagina {i+1} ---'\) print\(text\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\) import pdfplumber with pdfplumber.open\('01_Introducere_Python.pdf'\) as pdf: for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\): if i < 63: continue text = page.extract_text\(\) if text: print\(f'--- Pagina {i+1} ---'\) print\(text\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\) import pdfplumber with pdfplumber.open\('kmeans.pdf'\) as pdf: print\(f'Total pagini: {len\(pdf.pages\)}'\) for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\): text = page.extract_text\(\) if text: print\(f'--- Pagina {i+1} ---'\) print\(text\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\) import pdfplumber with pdfplumber.open\('04_Pandas_Library.pdf'\) as pdf: print\(f'Total pagini: {len\(pdf.pages\)}'\) for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\): text = page.extract_text\(\) if text: print\(f'--- Pagina {i+1} ---'\) print\(text[:600]\) ")
